app.title: Crypto Backtest
app.subtitle: AI-Powered Strategy Backtesting Platform
empty.backtest_desc: Configure your strategy parameters on the left, then click "Run Backtest" to see results.
empty.paper_desc: Configure your strategy and click "Deploy Paper Trading" to start a simulated trading session.
empty.live_desc: Deploy a real-time paper trading session with leverage support and live market data.
strategy.desc.RSI: Buy when RSI drops below oversold level, sell when RSI rises above overbought level.
strategy.desc.MACD: Buy when MACD crosses above signal line, sell when it crosses below.
strategy.desc.Bollinger Bands: Buy when price touches lower band (oversold), sell when price touches upper band (overbought).
strategy.desc.MA Cross: Buy when fast MA crosses above slow MA (golden cross), sell when it crosses below (death cross).
strategy.desc.Momentum Breakout: Buy when price breaks above N-period high, sell when price breaks below N-period low.
strategy.desc.RSI+MACD Confluence: Buy when RSI is oversold AND MACD histogram turns bullish. Sell when RSI is overbought AND MACD turns bearish.
strategy.desc.SuperTrend: Buy when SuperTrend flips bullish (price breaks above upper band), sell when it flips bearish.
strategy.desc.Volume Breakout: Buy when price breaks above N-period high with volume surge. Sell when price breaks below N-period low.
strategy.desc.Trend Rider: Ride trends using EMA crossover entry + ATR trailing stop exit. Stays in trades longer to capture full moves.
strategy.desc.Bear Hunter: SHORT overbought bounces in bearish regimes (EMA trend filter + RSI entry/exit).
strategy.desc.Trend Surfer: Dual-direction trend-following: LONG on bullish SuperTrend + EMA, SHORT on bearish. Rides trends both ways.
strategy.desc.Stochastic Pulse: Dual-oscillator mean-reversion using Stochastic + RSI for short-timeframe scalping. Buys when both oscillators are oversold, sells when either recovers.
param.desc.fast_ema: Fast EMA period for trend direction
param.desc.slow_ema: Slow EMA period for trend direction
param.desc.atr_multiplier: ATR multiplier for trailing stop distance
param.desc.trend_filter_ema: Long-term EMA filter — only buy when price is above this
param.desc.ema_fast: Fast EMA period for regime detection
param.desc.ema_slow: Slow EMA period for regime detection
param.desc.rsi_overbought: RSI level to trigger SHORT entry
param.desc.rsi_oversold: RSI level to trigger COVER exit
param.desc.rsi_midline: RSI midline — COVER when RSI crosses below this
param.desc.rsi_entry: RSI must be below this to enter
